description: Global pool of available blackboard variable presets for Olympe Engine

availableVariables.name: targetDistance
availableVariables.description: Distance to the current target entity

availableVariables.name: targetSeen
availableVariables.description: Whether the target is currently visible

availableVariables.name: targetEntityID
availableVariables.description: Entity ID of the current target

availableVariables.name: moveSpeed
availableVariables.description: Current movement speed of the entity

availableVariables.name: patrolIndex
availableVariables.description: Index of the current patrol waypoint

availableVariables.name: destinationReached
availableVariables.description: Whether the entity has reached its destination

availableVariables.name: currentState
availableVariables.description: Current AI state label (e.g. idle, patrol, chase)

availableVariables.name: health
availableVariables.description: Current health points of the entity

availableVariables.name: lastAttacker
availableVariables.description: Entity ID of the last entity that attacked this entity

availableVariables.name: damageDealt
availableVariables.description: Total damage dealt in the current encounter

availableVariables.name: customTag
availableVariables.description: General-purpose string tag for custom logic
